item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-031","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed asleep on Mindthus/TVG and routed the request as a release review. It asked for appropriate release artifacts and listed object-specific audit dimensions: regressions, compatibility, boundary coverage, config/migration/deploy safety, release note accuracy, test sufficiency, and unrelated changes. No artifact-strengthening loop was triggered merely from the word audit."}
